implBasis: self-built dl/dt/dd(context-driven direction/divided;vertical=CSS grid / horizontal=flex column);零外部 primitive
note: spec / tsx docblock / anatomy / principles / showcase 五方逐句比對一致:typography(dt fg-secondary / dd foreground,2026-07-05 顯式宣告 fix 已落)、間距 token(--item-gap-label-desc-reading=2px 實測 layoutSpace.css:15;layout-space-tight;divided py+border-b last:border-b-0)、cols 1/2/3 grid、horizontal dd break-all min-w-0 text-right、空值 consumer 傳 '-'+text-foreground(元件不 normalize)、anatomy story 清單(spec:191 列 5 個 = 實際 5 exports)、principles LinkTo 目標名全部命中 showcase name。無 claim-vs-code drift。
